ANSWER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100118482) FILED BY DEFENDANT CLEAR RECON CORP

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT IS SUSTAINED IN PART AND OVERRULED IN PART. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE CAUSES OF ACTION FOR VIOLATION OF CCC 2924.17, CONVERSION, UNJUST ENRICHMENT - THESE CAUSES OF ACTION ARE BASED ON UNSUPPORTED THEORY REGARDING 125% CAP PROVISION IN THE CONTRACT. DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE CAUSE OF ACTION FOR UCL VIOLATION - PLAINTIFF FAILS TO ALLEGE ANY FACTS IN SUPPORT OF ANY AVAILABLE REMEDY UNDER THIS STATUTE; DEMURRER IS SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO THE VIOLATION OF ROSENTHAL ACT - PLAINTIFF FAILED TO CITE AUTHORITY OR ALLEGE FACTS TO SHOW THAT FORECLOSE IS A DEBT COLLECTION ACTIVITY WITHIN THE MEANING OF THE ACT. DEMURRER IS OTHERWISE OVERRULED. CAUSES OF ACTION FOR WRONGFUL FORECLOSURE, FRAUD AND INTENTIONAL INTERFERENCE WITH CONTRACTUAL RELATIONS ARE SUFFICIENTLY ALLEGED. PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC3.1312(B). JUDGE CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: N. WONG, NOT REPORTED (D501)

DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-22-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances via Courtcall:
Elizabeth Cermak, Esq., (415) 259-9454, appearing for Josefina Pacumio, Plaintiff.
Michael Rapkine, Esq., (626) 535-1900, appearing for Wells Fargo Bank, Defendant.

ARGUED. Mr. Rapkine stated that he contested to the tentative ruling as to the Court overruling as to fraud and contractual obligations and that CCC 2923.7 was not addressed. Ms. Cermak provided oral argument.

The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. DEMURRER to 1ST Amended COMPLAINT is SUSTAINED in PART and OVERRULED in PART. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the causes of action for Violation of CCC 2924.17, conversion, unjust enrichment - these causes of action are based on unsupported theory regarding 125% cap provision in the contract. Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the cause of action for UCL violation - plaintiff fails to allege any facts in support of any available remedy under this statute; Demurrer is sustained without leave to amend as to the violation of Rosenthal Act - Plaintiff failed to cite authority or allege facts to show that foreclose is a debt collection activity within the meaning of the Act. Demurrer is otherwise overruled. Causes of action for wrongful foreclosure, fraud and intentional interference with contractual relations are sufficiently alleged. Prevailing party to prepare order in compliance with CRC3.1312(b). Judge Charles F. Haines, Clerk: N. Wong, Not reported (D501)
